allow: Bash(python3 -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\(''Flask app created successfully''\); print\(''Routes:''\); [print\(f''  {rule}''\) for rule in sorted\(str\(r\) for r in app.url_map.iter_rules\(\)\)]")
